title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第6部分）
content:
they still require labelled datasets during model fine-tuning, which is inapplicable to our targeting problem context.

Moreover, most works emphasize on data selection for better addressing catastrophic forgetting issues, while little work has paid attention to training efficiency, which becomes crucial considering practical computation and storage constraints. None of them consider addressing training efficiency and anti-forgetting issues together. Several prior works (Li, Shen, and Chen 2022) have successfully applied coreset selection in learning over streams with low training costs. However, we observe that existing coreset selection approaches are stateless based on a mini- batch scheme overlooking important information across continuous data streams. • Competitors/people working in similar areas that the applicant is aware of.
